name: Chair Squat
how_to_notes: Stand in front of a chair, sit hips back until you lightly touch the seat, then stand tall. Keep knees tracking over toes.

name: Glute Bridge
how_to_notes: Lie on your back with knees bent, press through heels, and lift hips until shoulders, hips, and knees form a line.

name: Step-Back Lunge
how_to_notes: Step one foot back, lower under control, then drive through the front foot to stand. Use a wall for balance if needed.

name: Calf Raise
how_to_notes: Stand tall, rise onto the balls of your feet, pause briefly, and lower slowly while keeping weight even.

name: Incline Push-Up
how_to_notes: Place hands on a sturdy elevated surface, keep a straight line from head to heels, and lower chest with elbows about 45 degrees.

name: Wall Push-Up
how_to_notes: Stand arm's length from a wall, bend elbows to bring chest toward the wall, then press away while keeping ribs down.

name: Bent-Over Backpack Row
how_to_notes: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, pull a loaded backpack toward your ribs, and squeeze shoulder blades gently.

name: Band Pull-Apart
how_to_notes: Hold a light band at shoulder height, pull hands apart without shrugging, then return slowly under control.

name: Dead Bug
how_to_notes: Lie on your back, brace gently, lower opposite arm and leg without arching your back, then switch sides.

name: Forearm Plank
how_to_notes: Set elbows under shoulders, keep body in a straight line, and stop if your lower back starts to sag.

name: Side Plank From Knees
how_to_notes: Lie on one side with knees bent, lift hips, and keep shoulders stacked while breathing steadily.

name: Bird Dog
how_to_notes: Start on hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg, pause with hips level, then return slowly.

name: Marching In Place
how_to_notes: Stand tall and march at a pace that lets you speak in short sentences. Reduce knee height if needed.

name: Sit-to-Stand
how_to_notes: Sit on a stable chair, lean slightly forward, stand without dropping knees inward, then sit with control.

name: Low-Impact Jumping Jack
how_to_notes: Step one foot out at a time while raising arms, keeping impact low and breathing steady.

name: Farmer Carry
how_to_notes: Hold two manageable weights, stand tall, walk slowly, and keep shoulders relaxed without leaning.

name: Cat-Cow
how_to_notes: On hands and knees, gently round and extend your spine through a comfortable range while breathing.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
how_to_notes: Use a half-kneeling stance, tuck hips slightly, and shift forward until you feel a mild front-hip stretch.

name: Thoracic Rotation
how_to_notes: From hands and knees, place one hand behind your head and rotate your upper back without forcing the range.

name: Standing Hamstring Sweep
how_to_notes: Extend one heel forward, hinge slightly, sweep hands toward the foot, then stand tall and switch sides.
